ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., Model0, Model1) */,
  "clean_docs" INTEGER /* Indicates if clean documentation is available */,
  "num_conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions associated with the model */,
  "pre_trained" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is pre-trained */,
  "trainable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is trainable */,
  "num_filters" INTEGER /* Number of filters used in the model */,
  "dropout" INTEGER /* Indicates if dropout is applied */,
  "num_units" INTEGER /* Number of units in the model's layers */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy achieved by the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "framework" TEXT /* The machine learning framework used */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON string to store additional hyperparameters */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the training dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES training_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Git commit hash for version control */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model associated with this dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data (e.g., dataset name) */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., structured, unstructured) */,
  "preprocessing_steps" TEXT /* Description of preprocessing steps applied to the data */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of train/validation/test splits */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, HDF5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the specific experiment */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role in the system (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
